---
title: "ICE I-213 analysis 2022-2025"
author: "UWCHR"
date: "2026-02-18"
output:
    html_document:
        html_preview: true
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 3
        toc_float: true
        code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=TRUE}

options(scipen = 1000000)

library(pacman)

p_load(here, tidyverse, zoo, lubridate, ggplot2, plotly, gghighlight, viridis, ggmap, tidygeocoder, sf, rnaturalearth)

```


```{r load_data, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=TRUE}

file <- "sea-i213s-2026-02-13-geocoded.csv"

df <- read_delim(here('analyze', 'input', file), delim='|') %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  mutate(apprehension_date = as.Date(apprehension_date),
         entry_date = as.Date(entry_date),
         occupation_text = str_to_upper(occupation_text),
         app_ldmk_other_comment_text = str_to_upper(app_ldmk_other_comment_text)) %>% 
  mutate(week = floor_date(apprehension_date, "week", week_start = "Monday"),
         month = floor_date(apprehension_date, "month"),
         cy_quarter = as.factor(quarter(apprehension_date, fiscal_start = 1, with_year=TRUE)),
         fy_quarter = as.factor(quarter(apprehension_date, fiscal_start = 10, with_year=TRUE)),
         fy = substr(quarter(apprehension_date, fiscal_start = 10, with_year = TRUE), 0, 4),
         cy = year (apprehension_date))

ddp_arrests <- arrow::read_feather(
  "https://github.com/deportationdata/ice/raw/refs/heads/main/data/arrests-latest.feather"
)

ddp_arrests_sea <- ddp_arrests %>% 
  mutate(apprehension_date = as.Date(apprehension_date),
         final_order_date = as.Date(final_order_date)) |>
  mutate(apprehension_method = fct(apprehension_method)) |>
  mutate(criminality = apprehension_criminality == "1 Convicted Criminal") |>
  mutate(n_dupe = row_number(), .by = c("apprehension_date", "apprehension_method", "apprehension_criminality", "unique_identifier")) |>
  filter(is.na(unique_identifier) | n_dupe == 1) |>
  mutate(week = floor_date(apprehension_date, "week", week_start = "Monday"),
         month = floor_date(apprehension_date, "month"),
         cy_quarter = as.factor(quarter(apprehension_date, fiscal_start = 1, with_year=TRUE)),
         fy_quarter = as.factor(quarter(apprehension_date, fiscal_start = 10, with_year=TRUE))) %>% 
  filter(apprehension_aor == "Seattle Area of Responsibility")

rm(ddp_arrests)

```

```{r}

p1 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         week >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(week) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = n)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per week",
       subtitle = "Seattle AOR")

p1

p2 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(month) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per month",
       subtitle = "Seattle AOR")

p2

p3 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  mutate(state = case_when(state %in% c("WA", "OR", "AK") ~ state,
                         TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(month, state) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, color = state)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per month",
       subtitle = "Seattle AOR")

p3

```

```{r}

dat1 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         month >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(month) %>% 
  mutate(source = "SEA I-213s")

dat2 <- ddp_arrests_sea %>% 
  filter(apprehension_aor == "Seattle Area of Responsibility",
         month >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(month) %>% 
  mutate(source = "SEA arrests per DDP")

dat <- rbind(dat1, dat2)

p1 <- dat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, color = source)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "I-213s versus ICE arrests")

p1

# Comparison of DDP arrests to I-213s per month for SEA AOR

dat_wide <- pivot_wider(dat, id_cols = month, names_from = source, values_from = n) %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  drop_na() %>% 
  filter(month < "2025-10-01") %>% 
  mutate(diff = sea_arrests_per_ddp - sea_i_213s,
         pct = sea_i_213s / sea_arrests_per_ddp * 100)

```

```{r}

# uwchr <- read_delim(here::here('analyze', 'input', 'ice_arrests_fy12-23ytd.csv.gz'), delim='|')

url <- "https://drive.usercontent.google.com/download?id=1XAOS7t3ijImVXQ9G7l6xdCr_rBh8i4cz&export=download&authuser=0&confirm=t&uuid=0c4a4b74-5e5f-4f00-8c8a-eb00a56708f9&at=APcXIO3JvUiU3ilszJZ3EAuIE01Y:1772065031530"
f <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv.gz")
download.file(url, f, mode = "wb")

uwchr <- read.delim(f, sep='|')

uwchr_sea <- uwchr %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility == "Seattle Area of Responsibility") %>%
  mutate(arrest_date = mdy(arrest_date),
         month = floor_date(arrest_date, unit="month"),
         cy_quarter = as.factor(quarter(arrest_date, fiscal_start = 1, with_year = TRUE)),
         fy_quarter = as.factor(quarter(arrest_date, fiscal_start = 10, with_year = TRUE)),
         fy = as.numeric(substr(quarter(arrest_date, fiscal_start = 10, with_year = TRUE), 0, 4)),
         cy = year(arrest_date),
         source = "UWCHR")

rm(uwchr)
  
uwchr_sea_per_fy_quarter <- uwchr_sea %>% 
  count(fy_quarter, source)
  
i213s_per_fy_quarter <- df %>% 
  mutate(source = "I-213") %>% 
   filter(month >= "2022-01-01") %>%
  count(fy_quarter, source)

ddp_sea_per_fy_quarter <- ddp_arrests_sea %>% 
  filter(apprehension_aor == "Seattle Area of Responsibility") %>% 
  count(fy_quarter) %>% 
  mutate(source = "DDP")

dat <- rbind(i213s_per_fy_quarter, ddp_sea_per_fy_quarter, uwchr_sea_per_fy_quarter) %>% 
  mutate(fy_quarter = as.factor(as.character(fy_quarter)))

every_nth = function(n) {
  return(function(x) {x[c(TRUE, rep(FALSE, n - 1))]})
}

p1 <- dat %>% 
  mutate(fy_quarter = str_replace_all(fy_quarter, "\\.", "Q")) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, fill = source)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 8)) +
  labs(title = "Historic increase in ICE apprehensions in\nQ1 of FY 2026",
       subtitle = "Seattle Area of Responsibility")

p1

p2 <- dat %>% 
  mutate(fy_quarter = str_replace_all(fy_quarter, "\\.", "Q")) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, color = source, group = source)) +
  ylim(0, NA) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 8)) +
  labs(title = "Historic increase in ICE apprehensions in\nQ1 of FY 2026",
       subtitle = "Seattle Area of Responsibility")

p2


```

% change = ((Current Month's Value - Previous Month's Value) / Previous Month's Value) * 100

```{r pct_increase}

i213s_per_month_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(month) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 )

i213s_per_fy_quarter_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(fy_quarter) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 )

i213s_per_cy_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(cy) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 )

i213s_per_cy_pct_change_state <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>% 
  count(cy, state) %>% 
  group_by(state) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 ) %>% 
  arrange(state, cy)

# These will be comparing partial FYs
i213s_per_fy_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(fy) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 )

```

```{r}

i213s_per_fy_quarter_state_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>% 
  count(fy_quarter, state) %>% 
  group_by(state) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 ) %>% 
  arrange(state, fy_quarter)

p1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_state_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, fill = state)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter")

p1

p1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_state_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = pct_change, fill = state)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "% change I-213 arrests per FY quarter")

p1

p2 <- i213s_per_cy_pct_change_state %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = cy, y = pct_change, fill = state)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  labs(title = "% change I-213 arrests per CY")

p2
  
```

```{r}

i213s_per_fy_quarter_site_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2024-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")
         ) %>% 
  count(fy_quarter, site_code) %>% 
  group_by(site_code) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 ) %>% 
  arrange(site_code, fy_quarter)

p1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_site_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, fill = site_code)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter by suboffice")

p1

p1.1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_site_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, color = site_code, group = site_code)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter by suboffice")

p1.1

p2 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_site_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = pct_change, fill = site_code)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "% change I-213 arrests per FY quarter by suboffice")

p2

```

```{r}

i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2024-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")
         ) %>% 
  count(fy_quarter, county, state) %>% 
  group_by(state, county) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 ) %>% 
  arrange(state, county, fy_quarter)

p1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(state == "WA") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, fill = county)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter by county")

ggplotly(p1)

p2 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(state == 'WA') %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = pct_change, fill = county)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "% change I-213 arrests per FY quarter by county")

ggplotly(p2)

```

# Method

```{r}

top_method <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA") %>% 
  count(apprehension_method_descr) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n))
  
p1 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date > "2024-12-31") %>%
  mutate(week = floor_date(apprehension_date, unit="week", week_start = "Monday"),
         apprehension_method_descr = case_when(apprehension_method_descr %in% head(top_method$apprehension_method_descr, 5) ~ apprehension_method_descr,
                                               TRUE ~ "All others")) %>% 
  count(week, apprehension_method_descr) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = n, color = apprehension_method_descr)) +
  geom_line()

p1

p2 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date > "2024-12-31",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>%
  mutate(week = floor_date(apprehension_date, unit="week", week_start = "Monday"),
         apprehension_method_descr = case_when(apprehension_method_descr %in% head(top_method$apprehension_method_descr, 5) ~ apprehension_method_descr,
                                               TRUE ~ "All others")) %>% 
  count(week, state, apprehension_method_descr) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = n, color = apprehension_method_descr)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~state)

p2

```

```{r gender}

dat <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2021-10-01") %>% 
  mutate(month = floor_date(apprehension_date, unit="months")) %>% 
  count(gender_code, month)
  
p1 <- dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, fill = gender_code)) +
  geom_col(position="fill")

p1

```

```{r country}

country_top <- df %>% 
  count(citizenship_country_descr) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n))

dat <- df %>% 
  filter(
    apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>% 
  mutate(month = floor_date(apprehension_date, unit="months"),
         citizenship_country_descr = case_when(citizenship_country_descr %in% head(country_top$citizenship_country_descr, 10) ~ citizenship_country_descr,
                                             TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(citizenship_country_descr, month, state)
  
p1 <- dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, fill = citizenship_country_descr)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~state)

p1

chnv <- c("CUBA", "HAITI", "NICARAGUA", "VENEZUELA")

dat <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>% 
  mutate(month = floor_date(apprehension_date, unit="months"),
         citizenship_country_descr = case_when(citizenship_country_descr %in% chnv ~ citizenship_country_descr,
                                             TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(citizenship_country_descr, month)
  
p2 <- dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, fill = citizenship_country_descr)) +
  geom_col(position="fill")

p2

dat <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>% 
  mutate(year = year(apprehension_date),
         citizenship_country_descr = case_when(citizenship_country_descr %in% chnv ~ citizenship_country_descr,
                                             TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(citizenship_country_descr, year, state)
  
p3 <- dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = citizenship_country_descr)) +
  geom_col(position="fill") +
  facet_wrap(~state)

p3

```

```{r country}

country_top <- df %>% 
  count(citizenship_country_descr) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n))

dat <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>% 
  mutate(month = floor_date(apprehension_date, unit="months"),
         citizenship_country_descr = case_when(citizenship_country_descr %in% head(country_top$citizenship_country_descr, 10) ~ citizenship_country_descr,
                                             TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(citizenship_country_descr, state, month)
  
p1 <- dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, fill = citizenship_country_descr)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~state)

p1

dat <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>% 
  mutate(year = year(apprehension_date),
         citizenship_country_descr = case_when(citizenship_country_descr %in% head(country_top$citizenship_country_descr, 10) ~ citizenship_country_descr,
                                             TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(citizenship_country_descr, state, year)
  
p1 <- dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = citizenship_country_descr)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~state)

p1

```

```{r}

chnv <- c("CUBA", "HAITI", "NICARAGUA", "VENEZUELA")

dat <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2025-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>% 
  mutate(month = floor_date(apprehension_date, unit="months"),
         citizenship_country_descr = case_when(citizenship_country_descr %in% chnv ~ "CHNV",
                                             TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS"),
         apprehension_method_descr = case_when(apprehension_method_descr %in% head(top_method$apprehension_method_descr, 5) ~ apprehension_method_descr,
                                               TRUE ~ "All others")) %>% 
  count(citizenship_country_descr, apprehension_method_descr, month)
  
p1 <- dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, fill = citizenship_country_descr)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~apprehension_method_descr)

p1

```

```{r}

dat <- df %>% 
  mutate(time_since_entry = apprehension_date - entry_date) %>% 
  group_by(month) %>% 
  summarize(avg_time_since_entry = mean(time_since_entry, na.rm=TRUE))

p1 <- dat %>% 
  filter(month >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = avg_time_since_entry)) +
  geom_line() +
  ylim(0, NA)

p1

```

```{r}

dat <- df %>% 
  filter(month >= "2022-01-01") %>%
  mutate(year = year(apprehension_date)) %>% 
  count(year, any_usc)

p1 <- dat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = any_usc)) +
  geom_col()

p1

p2 <- dat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = any_usc)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill")

p2

```

```{r}

dat <- df %>% 
  filter(month >= "2022-01-01") %>%
  mutate(year = year(apprehension_date)) %>% 
  count(year, criminal_charge_status)

p1 <- dat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = criminal_charge_status)) +
  geom_col()

p1

p2 <- dat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = criminal_charge_status)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill")

p2

```

```{r}

dat1 <- ddp_arrests_sea %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>%
  mutate(year = year(apprehension_date),
         criminal_charge_status = case_when(
           apprehension_criminality == "1 Convicted Criminal" ~ "Conviction",
           apprehension_criminality == "2 Pending Criminal Charges" ~ "Pending",
           apprehension_criminality == "3 Other Immigration Violator" ~ "None",
         )) %>% 
  count(year, criminal_charge_status) %>% 
  mutate(source = "DDP")

dat2 <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>%
  mutate(year = year(apprehension_date)) %>% 
  count(year, criminal_charge_status) %>% 
  mutate(source = "I213s")

dat <- rbind(dat1, dat2)

p1 <- dat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = criminal_charge_status)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~source)

p1

p2 <- dat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = criminal_charge_status)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill") +
  facet_wrap(~source)

p2


```
